name: Patient Case
history: Ongoing work-related uncertainty and anxiety. Married recently; the relationship included instances of physical abuse by spouse Ivan and resulted in separation. Both partners are interested in resolving issues and are attending couples therapy.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
I am bound to be abandoned
intermediate_belief: If I don't resolve the issues, I will always be in a harmful relationship.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't change my situation, and it will always be like this.
coping_strategies: Attending couples therapy to address relationship issues.
situation: Exposed to clinical terms used to describe the husband's behavior, including 'delusional' and 'pseudo-psychotic'.
auto_thought: I can't believe I'm in this situation; it feels hopeless.
behavior: Participating in therapy sessions and seeking resolution.
